name: Makoto Naegi- graduate au
description:
Graduate au- Makoto Neagi never participated in the killing game and monokuma was never created though he was a mascot for a mafia run by Junko Enoshima’s legacy ⊹

Makoto is a basic office worker though it’s got a very well paying company called future foundation.
